name: Tag
description: A small label for categorizing or marking items.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant controlling fill, border, and text styles.

props.name: size
props.description: Tag size affecting font size and padding.

props.name: colorScheme
props.description: Color scheme for the tag. Overrides default variant colors.

props.name: closable
props.description: Show a close button that dismisses the tag with animation.

props.name: interactive
props.description: Make the tag focusable and clickable, emitting `kb-click`.

props.name: dot
props.description: Show a small colored dot indicator before the label.

props.name: kbDraggable
props.description: Enable HTML5 drag-and-drop on this tag.

props.name: value
props.description: Value identifier used for drag data and reorder events.

slots.name: icon
slots.description: Leading icon element rendered before the label.

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Close button clicked; tag animates out and removes itself.
